description: Salesforce to D365 F&O via OData. Customer, Product, Sales Order sync. Production-validated at HCA.
criticalRules: D365 OData requires dataAreaId on every entity - never null, must match legal entity
D365 date format is ISO 8601 with time: '2024-01-15T00:00:00Z' - Salesforce dates need T00:00:00Z appended
D365 strings have exact max lengths - CustomerAccount 20 chars, Name 60 chars - truncate or reject
D365 OData PATCH requires only changed fields - do not send all fields on update
D365 OData POST for new records must NOT include @odata.etag - only for PATCH
D365 enum fields (SalesStatus, InvoiceStatus) only accept exact enum values - validate before send
D365 amount fields must be Decimal type - cast explicitly: payload.Amount as Number
D365 customer account must exist before sales order - sync sequence matters

keyMappings.dataAreaId: From config/properties - e.g. 'USMF' for US legal entity

authPattern: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials via Azure AD. Token endpoint: https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenantId}/oauth2/token
dateConversion: fun toD365Date(d) = if (d != null and d != '') d ++ 'T00:00:00Z' else null
commonFailures: dataAreaId wrong: legal entity not configured or typo - check D365 legal entities list
CustomerAccount not found: customer sync must run before order sync
String too long: D365 OData returns 400 with field max length in error message
Auth token expired: D365 token lifetime is 1 hour - implement token caching in Mule
OData batch failures: D365 returns 200 with individual errors in batch - check each response
